Detector overfit to superficial artifacts misclassifies human text as AI or vice versa.
LLM-as-judge exhibits prompt sensitivity, self-preference, and rubric drift, masking true quality.
Narrative coherence benchmarks are gamed via checklist inclusion, not genuine plot logic.
Style drift detector flags intentional stylistic shifts (e.g., POV changes) as regressions.
Template echo detector misclassifies genre-typical structures as template copies.
Stability metrics report "stable but wrong" patterns where outputs are consistent yet misaligned with references or human judgment.
Memory benchmarks encourage benchmark-specific pattern learning instead of general long-range reasoning.
Memory – evaluate long_range_memory_benchmark_metric_v1 on multi_distance_memory_suite_v1; derive retention curves and detect interference-related collapses.
Only validated failures may be promoted into benchmark fixtures.

source_findings.raw_text: Cadence-only classification tasks distinguishing human vs LLM paragraphs using structural features.
Each paragraph must include controlled sentence-length burstiness rather than a flat medium-length distribution.
Every paragraph must be assigned an information-density band and must conform to that band's density constraints.
Register drift per sentence and per paragraph must remain inside the allowed drift window for the active voice.
Maintain a rolling paragraph buffer for sentence lengths and trigger burst modulation when medium-length clustering persists.
Tag each paragraph with an information-density band and route generation constraints through that band profile.
Score each sentence on a register axis and block abrupt register jumps beyond configured drift thresholds.
Register monotony or abrupt register flips that confuse voice.
Feed paragraphs with uniform sentence lengths into the cadence validator and verify burstiness violations are raised.
Construct paragraphs with excessive clause stacking and ensure clause-depth run caps trigger.
Generate high-density, medium-density, and low-density paragraphs and verify density-band assignment and enforcement.

proposals.rationale: Multiple findings map into voice_library with repeatable concepts that should become reusable library assets rather than prompt-only logic.

dependencies: schema contracts for library entries
human review of naming and scope
risks: library bloat if entries are not deduplicated

conflicts.raw_text: Register drift per sentence and per paragraph must remain inside the allowed drift window for the active voice.
Editing passes may not reduce entropy and idiosyncrasy below the configured preservation floor.
Load per-character idiosyncrasy profiles and enforce bounded reuse of signature discourse markers or phrase fossils.
After each edit pass, compare entropy and idiosyncrasy against the pre-edit reference and restore voice markers when needed.
Register monotony or abrupt register flips that confuse voice.

source_findings.raw_text: Voice preservation and style drift metrics MUST be applied before and after any automated editing or post-processing step.
Monitor style consistency dashboards to detect unexpected voice drift across releases.
For editing pipelines, measure voice preservation and semantic fidelity before enabling new editors in production.
Style drift detector flags intentional stylistic shifts (e.g., POV changes) as regressions.
Editing pipelines slowly erode voice through cumulative small changes that evade single-step checks.
Style consistency – compute style_consistency_metric_v2 over voice_locked_story_suite_v1 across chapters; assert drift within predefined thresholds.
Voice preservation after editing – measure voice_preservation_after_edit_v1 and semantic fidelity on edited_pairs_voice_labelled_v1; compare to human labels.
Register drift per sentence and per paragraph must remain inside the allowed drift window for the active voice.
